name: Real Evaluator Smoke Test
description: Minimal end-to-end smoke case for exercising the real eval validator pipeline.
prompt: Create a file named hello.txt containing exactly Hello, validator!

expected.description: The agent should create hello.txt with the exact requested content.

assertions.description: hello.txt should contain the expected text

success_criteria: hello.txt contains the exact expected content
evaluation_hints: Check both workspace state and final response clarity.
